failureModes.summary: A UI event emitted without a matching UITransitionSettlementRecord.
failureModes.releaseConsequence: Block release until the settlement join is restored.

failureModes.summary: The same route-family action emitted multiple times without a new anchor or settlement.
failureModes.releaseConsequence: Repair dedupe before the board can be trusted for rate metrics.

failureModes.summary: Runtime event emission no longer matches the published route contract, automation anchor, or semantic coverage.
failureModes.releaseConsequence: Block release until runtime and contract artifacts are updated together.

failureModes.summary: A dependent support event, such as restore, appeared before the corresponding replay entry.
failureModes.releaseConsequence: Block release until event ordering becomes lawful.

failureModes.summary: A route or event emitted fields above the permitted disclosure class.
failureModes.releaseConsequence: Immediate redaction repair required before release.
